opportunity_summary: KDDI containerized immersion cooling DC at MHI Yokohama Hardtech Hub. PUE below 1.07 verified. 50kVA server load, 53.5kVA total. GIGABYTE R282-Z93/R182-Z91 rack servers.
notes: Container-type edge DC; small scale qualifies. 43% power reduction vs air cooling. 94% cooling energy reduction demonstrated.

opportunity_summary: KDDI demonstration achieved PUE 1.05 with immersion cooling at Oyama Network Center. 94% reduction in cooling energy vs conventional air cooling.
notes: Demonstration/pilot site. Exact MW unknown but container-type suggests small scale.

facility_name: KDDI Osaka Sakai AI Data Center
opportunity_summary: Former Sharp LCD plant converted to AI DC in ~6 months. Hybrid cooling (air + DLC). NVIDIA AI infra via HPE partnership. General service applications from April 2026.
notes: Opening early 2026. Acquired April 2025. PUE not yet disclosed but DLC confirmed.

facility_name: IIJ Shiroi Data Center Campus Phase 3
opportunity_summary: Phase 3 building at Shiroi campus: 10MW initial (expandable to 25MW), 1,000 racks, 5,400 sqm. DLC-ready design with reserved pipe routing. Construction began June 2025, operational FY2026.
notes: PUE ~1.2 range. Qualifies on MW (10MW) and liquid cooling readiness. AI workload focus.

opportunity_summary: PFN/IIJ/JAIST AImod: direct liquid-cooled high-density AI servers. Design pPUE 1.1 (free cooling), 1.2 annual average. 30 server nodes with 256 MN-Core 2 AI processors. NEDO-funded.
notes: Research collaboration. 7:3 water:air cooling ratio. Supply water temp adjustable 17-45C. Test ops July 2025, full-scale April 2026.

cooling_type: Two-phase direct-to-chip cooling (retrofit in air-cooled DC)
opportunity_summary: Two-phase DLC demo in operational air-cooled DC. MHI provides cooling, NESIC builds IT. Insulating refrigerant (not water) used. Selected for Tokyo Metro Government GX innovation support. Began Dec 2024.
notes: Retrofit approach -- no major facility modifications needed. Tokyo Metro Govt backed. Coordinates approximate.

facility_name: EXEO Group Data Center (MHI Two-Phase DLC)
opportunity_summary: Japan's first commercial GPU servers with two-phase DLC. MHI cooling tech + EXEO DC operations. Handles GPU heat 1,000-1,400W range. One-stop GPU server service. Announced Dec 2025.
notes: First commercial (not demo) two-phase DLC GPU deployment in Japan. Exact location within Tokyo not disclosed. Coordinates approximate.

facility_name: NTT FACILITIES Products Engineering Hub for DC Cooling
cooling_type: DLC testbed (CDUs, hybrid dry coolers, chiller-less architectures)
opportunity_summary: Opened April 2025. Testbed for next-gen chiller-less DC cooling. Features CDUs, hybrid dry coolers. Partners with GF Piping Systems. Showroom + innovation platform for industry collaboration.
notes: Not a production DC but a dedicated cooling technology testbed. Qualifies on liquid cooling technology development. Coordinates approximate.

cooling_type: Direct-to-chip liquid cooling + rear-door heat exchangers
opportunity_summary: Equinix 4th Osaka IBX. 14.4MW IT power, 4,925 sqm. Chillers and pipes in each data hall supporting DLC and rear-door HX. Part of global 100+ DC liquid cooling rollout.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (verified) and capacity (14.4MW). PUE not disclosed.

opportunity_summary: NVIDIA DGX H100-Ready certified. 250,000 sqft, 21MW utility power. First DGX-certified liquid-cooled DC in Japan. Part of 6 APAC certified sites.
notes: PUE 1.4 does NOT qualify on PUE (above 1.20 threshold). Qualifies on liquid cooling only. Design PUE, may improve.

opportunity_summary: US$1B campus. 96MW. Japan's first NVIDIA DGX-Ready liquid-cooled DC (June 2025). 140kW/rack density. First APAC operator with OCP Ready v2 Hyperscale cert. PUE <1.34.
notes: PUE 1.34 does NOT qualify on PUE threshold. Qualifies on liquid cooling. ~35km from central Tokyo.

cooling_type: Hybrid cold-plate liquid cooling + magnetic levitation phase-change air
opportunity_summary: 350MW+ campus with 30,000+ racks. PUE 1.13 verified. Hybrid liquid+air cooling system developed with HEC Group. Industry standards development for cold-plate LC in China.
notes: Exceeds 10MW but PUE 1.13 and verified liquid cooling qualify. Originally built 2018, acquired by HEC-led consortium 2025.

cooling_type: Plate liquid cooling (R&D with Shanghai Jiao Tong University)
opportunity_summary: National Green Data Center (3 consecutive years). Best annual PUE 1.15 (2022). ~90,000 sqm. Plate liquid cooling R&D with SJTU. 100% green power for Building 2.
notes: Company-best PUE 1.15 verified. Operational since end of 2021.

opportunity_summary: World's largest server cluster submerged in liquid coolant at time of deployment. PUE 1.09 verified. 70%+ energy reduction vs conventional cooling. No fans/AC needed.
notes: PUE 1.09 qualifies. Part of Alibaba's five 'Super Data Centers'. Immersion cooling pioneer in China.

facility_name: ITCen-Aquatron Carbon Neutral AI Data Center
opportunity_summary: MOU signed for carbon-neutral AI DC in South Korea. Target PUE 1.051. Captures 95% of carbon for green cement. Energy from natural gas, hydrogen, ammonia.
notes: Announced/MOU stage. Exact location TBD. PUE is target, not measured. Coordinates approximate (Seoul default).

opportunity_summary: ICN10 in Seoul Digital Media City with Air-Assisted Liquid Cooling (AALC). Supports 70kW per rack for high-performance GPU servers. KakaoBank AI lab tenant (Feb 2024). AWS Direct Connect access.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (AALC verified). 70kW/rack density. Network-neutral facility.

facility_name: LG Uplus Pyeongchon 2 IDC (Liquid Cooling Demo)
opportunity_summary: LG Uplus liquid cooling demo room at Pyeongchon 2 IDC. Direct-to-chip (cold plate + CDU) for GPU servers. Partners: Vertiv, CoolIT, LG Electronics, GST. Verification started Sept 2025.
notes: Demo/verification stage at existing facility. Largest DC in Seoul metro area.

facility_name: LG Uplus Paju AI Data Center
cooling_type: Liquid cooling (LG Electronics + LG Energy Solution)
opportunity_summary: US$441.7M investment. Liquid cooling from LG Electronics, power from LG Energy Solution. Under construction, completion 2027. 'One LG' integrated approach.
notes: Major investment. LC confirmed but specific cooling type TBD pending Pyeongchon 2 trials.

facility_name: LG Electronics Pyeongtaek Immersion Cooling Testbed
cooling_type: Liquid immersion cooling (GRC tanks + SK Enmove fluids + LG CDU/FWU/chillers)
opportunity_summary: MOU signed Oct 2025 between LG, SK Enmove, GRC for immersion cooling. Pyeongtaek testbed expanding from DLC PoC to immersion. LG integrates CDUs/FWUs/chillers, SKEN supplies thermal fluids, GRC provides tank design.
notes: Testbed/PoC facility. SK Enmove first Korean company to develop immersion cooling fluids (2022).

facility_name: SK Telecom Ulsan AI Data Center
cooling_type: LNG cold energy cooling + liquid cooling (DLC/ILC/PLC)
opportunity_summary: 100MW AI DC in Ulsan industrial park (36,000 sqm). Phase 1: 40MW by Nov 2027, full 100MW by Feb 2029. Uses LNG cold energy from adjacent SK Gas plant. MOU with Giga Computing + SK Enmove for DLC/ILC/PLC. Plans to expand to 1-2GW.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (multiple methods via Giga Computing/SK Enmove partnership). MW verified.

opportunity_summary: AI-ready hyperscale DC at Genting Lane campus. 186,610 sqft, 7 stories. Completed early 2025. Designed for liquid cooling fit-out. Part of S$1.38B divestment to Keppel DC REIT. Lease secured to 2050.
notes: LC not yet deployed but facility designed for it.

opportunity_summary: US$260M investment. 6th Singapore IBX. 20MW. DLC-only (condenser water, not chilled water). Renewable energy PPA with Sembcorp. Expected Q1 2027.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (DLC verified). Condenser water for efficiency.

opportunity_summary: US$124M investment. 6th HK IBX. Liquid cooling for AI workloads. PUE target <=1.2. 100% renewable energy. Operational Q1 2026. Partners: Dell, Schneider Electric.
notes: PUE 1.2 is target, not measured. Qualifies on liquid cooling and target PUE.

cooling_type: Direct-to-chip liquid cooling + indirect evaporative cooling (IEC)
opportunity_summary: AirTrunk's first APAC deployment of direct-to-chip liquid cooling. 150MW initial (100MW expansion underway). Design PUE 1.15. 10.3 hectares. NVIDIA DGX-ready colocation partner.
notes: First APAC liquid cooling deployment for AirTrunk. PUE 1.15 design verified. 23% energy reduction from DLC.

facility_name: Bridge Data Centres Ulu Tiram Campus
opportunity_summary: 400MW campus with Malaysia's first large-scale Water Treatment Plant for cooling. Cold plate LC deployed at scale for AI workloads.
notes: Exceeds 10MW but qualifies on verified liquid cooling. WTP operational since 2025.

opportunity_summary: 12MW capacity. Completed July 2025 (ahead of schedule). Optional liquid cooling for customers. Brings AIMS total to 100MW+ in Klang Valley.
notes: Qualifies on 12MW capacity and liquid cooling option.

operator_company: YTL Power / YTL Data Center Holdings
opportunity_summary: 100MW AI DC with NVIDIA partnership. 80/20 liquid/air cooling config. Peak PUE target ~1.29. Under construction 2025.
notes: Qualifies on liquid cooling (DTC confirmed). PUE 1.29 above threshold but LC qualifies. In talks re full immersion cooling.

cooling_type: Hybrid dry-coolers + water-cooled chillers (172 dry-coolers, 86 chillers)
opportunity_summary: Largest single campus in APAC (ex-China). 320MW+ across 9 phases, 8.3 hectares. Design PUE 1.15. 132kV onsite substation. 80% less water than traditional DC.
notes: PUE 1.15 qualifies. Liquid cooling not explicitly confirmed for this campus specifically.

opportunity_summary: Proprietary LiquidCore cooling across all campuses. WUE 0.01 via closed-loop (fill once, circulate for life). Zero potable water. Saves 5 gigalitres/year. ~20 years LC experience.
notes: Pioneer in Australian liquid cooling. Exact PUE not found but WUE 0.01 is industry-leading.

cooling_type: Liquid cooling + immersion cooling (Submer partnership via ResetData)
opportunity_summary: IC3 Super West designed for air and liquid cooling. Australia's first Submer liquid immersion setup via ResetData partnership. Pioneer in liquid-cooled environments in Australia.
notes: Qualifies on liquid/immersion cooling. IC3 East PUE 1.28 (may indicate campus-level efficiency).

facility_name: Submer Madhya Pradesh Liquid-Cooled AI DC
operator_company: Submer Technologies / Government of Madhya Pradesh
cooling_type: Immersion cooling + direct-to-chip + hybrid liquid cooling
opportunity_summary: MOU signed July 28, 2025 for up to 1GW of liquid-cooled AI DCs in Madhya Pradesh. Zero water consumption. Immersion + DLC + hybrid methods. Local supply chain development.
notes: MOU stage, locations TBD. Coordinates approximate (Bhopal). 1GW total target across multiple facilities.

operator_company: Vantage Data Centers (acquired from Yondr Group)
opportunity_summary: 300MW+ campus on 73 acres at Sedenak Tech Park, Johor. Acquired from Yondr Nov 2025 as part of $1.6B APAC investment (GIC + ADIA). DLC confirmed. Green loan financed. EDGE certification target. 3 data centers when fully developed.
notes: Qualifies on verified liquid cooling (DLC). Vantage 3rd Malaysian campus. Part of 1GW APAC platform.

cooling_type: Advanced cooling (machine-learning control systems, high-temp servers)
opportunity_summary: Baidu's flagship cloud computing center. Annual average PUE 1.08 (improved from 1.1 in 2017 to 1.09 in 2018, further optimized). ML-based cooling control. High-temp server operation. Whole cabinet server design.
notes: PUE 1.08 qualifies. Liquid immersion not explicitly confirmed for this campus but advanced cooling tech verified. Baidu is major Chinese AI liquid cooling adopter.
